The 5W AVATAR
The 5W Avatar is a process and structure I use to create content that cuts through via
Facebook Ads.
This is the document itself which you need to make a copy of to edit and is further
explained in the videos below.
It's something I've used for many years, even before running ads on Facebook and is based
on core marketing principles.
I've adapted my approach and this document specifically for Facebook advertising and I've
attempted to distill this in a simple to follow manner. It may seem like a lot when you look at
the document however the biggest outcome is in actually creating the Avatar(s) and knowing
how to utilise them in your 4-Funnel System.
This forms a central part of the 3R Branding Framework - Relevance, Relationship and
Rapport. To nail all of these use the 5W Avatar to be relevant, build a relationship because
you understand who they are and lead them through your funnel through rapport.
If you truly want high profit and growth this is a key ingredient to moving away from "hey click
this ad get 85% off and kill my margins!" to getting customers to WANT to pay you more!
MASTERMIND STUDENTS!
Once you've completed your first 5W Avatar, post it in the Mastermind group and I'll provide
direct feedback to you if you wish.
